programmes.show_description: Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.

programmes.show_name: The Prime of Miss Jean Brodie
programmes.show_description: Frustrated by students she perceives as provincial and unwilling to marry her wealthy suitor, Miss Brodie seeks an appointment at an elite school in Edinburgh.
Based on Jilly Coopers bestseller, lust and rivalry surround British equestrians. Superbly adapted for the small screen, it lifts the veil on show jumping with romance, adventure and indulgence.
Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.
Jack Hargreaves celebrates rural England, blending folklore, crafts, and gentle storytelling as Hargreaves explores vanishing traditions, landscapes, and the quiet wisdom of country life.
When Dr. Watson thinks that he has seen a ghost, it puts Sherlock Holmes on a trail that leads to a crime at an art museum.
Dr. Watson accidentally comes home from his club with another man's coat, providing an important clue when the other man is murdered late that same night.
Sherlock Holmes seeks a rational explanation for the Winthrop family legend, which foretells the death of any family member who unexpectedly finds silver coins in his possession.
Fred tries to win overseas sales, but staff, clients and the bank manager make it hard.
Spencer is kicked out of university and demands a job-then teams up with Harry.
Cash-flow woes push Fred to seek investment, creating new leverage for others.
Mrs. Abbott exerts her authority over Frankie one too many times. It changes him into a latter-day "Red Shadow" and he gallops off with his new girlfriend Celeste to the registry office.
Sharon has a little secret. Unfortunately, it is somewhat difficult to share with Eric when they aren't even talking.
When Winston watches Manchester City train, Bloody Delilah is flooded with complaints about missed bin collections. The gang, thinking hes lonely, hatches a plan to cheer him up.
Spikes intelligence is highlighted when the team tackle a complex story.
The staff struggle to get the paper finished on time amid growing tensions.
Old stories resurface and threaten the future of the paper.
Scotland Yard is baffled by the distribution of tainted drugs around the London disco scene, so Sharron decides to follow a desperate addict.
Margaret and Ken try to track down sheep rustlers and rare egg smugglers. Harry is running afternoon tea dances for pensioners and also has to deal with the unwanted attentions of an admirer!
Plans shift as alliances change. The Maquis prepare for conflict while trust wavers. Leadership in London struggles to support them, as timing and communication become critical under rising pressure.
Renard orders executions, but Stuckler trades Philippe for his family. Nicole claims pregnancy to delay her fate. The Maquis attack German planes; Lewis surrenders to let the others escape.

Emily and Luc return to Le Crest as Liz arrives. Tension rises over missing allies and loyalty shifts. In London, Faith seeks support but now German assault begins before help can come,growing strain.
Fred tries to win overseas sales, but staff, clients and the bank manager make it hard.
Spencer is kicked out of university and demands a job-then teams up with Harry.
Cash-flow woes push Fred to seek investment, creating new leverage for others.
Pregnant Jane considers giving up her job.
Jane returns from holiday to new troubles: she must leave Michael and Robs flat, and her boss, facing sentencing for drugs, is replaced by a difficult cynic.
Jane copes with a flood of problem letters and calls. Val cites her horoscope and plans a money-making scheme: a blue movie with Vincent Fish.
Margaret and Ken try to track down sheep rustlers and rare egg smugglers. Harry is running afternoon tea dances for pensioners and also has to deal with the unwanted attentions of an admirer!
A paranoid game show host misinterprets gossip about his future. Guest starring Nick Hancock, Alan Cumming and Eleanor Bron.
An aged vampire uses seductive vampiric women posing as sex workers to lure men to his lair. When their commander vanishes, two macho Navy sailors fall into the deadly trap.
Sultry Emmanuelle is determined to do whatever it takes to be the sensation of Soho's strip clubs - even if it means signing up with London's sleaziest agent! A true-blue British erotic favourite!

Alex Dyke learns about another popular car from our past when he visits the National Motor Museum at Beaulieu.
Francis Coudrill presents a unique blend of animation and the European Western in this TV classic as Hank Rides Again. 10/13
Michael Caine is interviewed on the set of The Eagle Has Landed in 1971.
A paranoid game show host misinterprets gossip about his future. Guest starring Nick Hancock, Alan Cumming and Eleanor Bron.
Alex Dyke presents an hour of bubblegum pop and cheesy tracks to make you feel good.

Francis Coudrill presents a unique blend of animation and the European Western, including the making of the series. 13/13
The only clue at the site of two grisly murders is a chicken's foot. Baffled, Insp. Lestrade goes to Sherlock Holmes for assistance.
Alex Dyke learns about another popular car from our past when he visits the National Motor Museum at Beaulieu.
Keith Barron Narrates The Story Of The Haunting Of Penrose.
Under mounting pressure, Fred considers giving up until a new angle appears.
A big day looms for the firm, but mishaps and rival agendas threaten it.
Cheese and Egg runs for the depot committee to protect the gangs interests, while Bloody Delilah secretly backs Smellie Ibbotson to challenge their schemes.
After Winston is banned from football for mischief, he makes life difficult at the depot. Bloody Delilah steps in at court, allowing him to attend the City match.
Alex Dyke presents an hour of bubblegum pop to make you feel good.
Romantic complications begin to affect the working relationships.
The team pull together to save the paper from collapse.
That's My Dog, game show hosted by Derek Hobson where dogs and their owners compete for money and prizes.
The team face a deadly challenge from trained assassins when they are assigned to protect a deposed Latin American dictator currently in exile in the south of France.
The Champions are enlisted to help when a mysterious plane destroys a US naval aircraft.
Boon is hired by an American evangelical preacher to find out who is sabotaging his shows and ruining his chances of winning a cable television contract.
German forces overrun the area, pushing the Maquis to retreat. Losses mount as survivors regroup in Beaufort. Liberation nears, while London leadership feels deep regret over costly decisions made

A killer with a grudge against McCallum attempts to exact revenge with a combination of poison and threatening telephone calls.
Stuart Guber leaves his performance-artist girlfriend to rejoin society, taking a job at a major record label. Chaos begins when his boss launches a bizarre sex-themed game show.
